content.body:
Thanks dietrich. I pulled out requirement in #52 because I wasn't sure whether they were consistent throughout existing best-practice (might be worth checking with Mozilla), and wanted to bring it up. Happy to drop or keep the requirement as the group decides.

From my perspective #53 is good to merge. I think Denjell approved it last week.

content.body: Sorry, I accidentally merged #58 - we can discuss it today and propose changes to it.

Do you mean #52? It's worth considering whether or not to include, not just for changes. It was written based on a comment from Andrew, but is onerous for non-chromium if the risks are being handled in a different way.

I've got a conflict this afternoon, so don't think I'll be able to make it to the meeting.
Question is should I rebase the #53 on top of it, or leave it as-is, as the conflict will be different whether we include it or not.
